Frequently Asked Questions
Q1. When did the National Insurance NICL Assistant Online Application Process Start?
The online application process started on 18 July 2026 .
Q2. What is the Exam Date for National Insurance NICL Assistant 2026?
The Phase-I & II Examination will be conducted in 27 August to 30 October 2026 .
Q3. Where can I find the syllabus for the National Insurance NICL Assistant Examination?
The detailed syllabus and examination scheme are available in the official notification. Candidates are advised to read the notification carefully for complete details.
Q4. How can I download the National Insurance NICL Assistant Notification PDF?
Candidates can download the notification through SarkariResult.com.
Q5. What is the last date to apply online for National Insurance NICL Assistant Recruitment 2026?
The last date to apply online is 07 August 2026..
Q6. What is the last date to pay the application fee?
Candidates can pay the application fee up to 07 August 2026 .
Q7. How can I apply for National Insurance NICL Assistant Recruitment 2026?
NICL Assistant Online Form 2026 for 500 Post .
tables: National Insurance Company Limited (NICL) has released Assistant Recruitment Notification 2026 Those candidates who are interested in this NICL Assistant Exam can Apply Online Form 18/07/2026 to 07/08/2026 . Read the NICL Assistant Post notification 2026 for recruitment eligibility, post information, selection procedure, age limit, pay scale and all other information.
